name: half-the-sky-turning-oppression-into-opportunity-for-women-worldwide
description: Nicholas Kristof and Sheryl WuDunn's landmark investigation into the oppression of women worldwide — sex trafficking, gender violence, maternal mortality — and the proven solutions that empower women and transform communities.
useCase: Understand the scale of global women's oppression and the most effective ways to empower women through education, microfinance, healthcare, and legal reform.
knownRisks: Contains disturbing accounts of violence and abuse
Some may disagree with the authors' policy recommendations
Statistics are from 2009 — some data has changed
